summary: Adjusted the opening paragraph so the chapter now enters directly from the previous chapter's townhouse-to-car handoff while preserving the same Mount Street setup, weather, and tone. The existing closing lie motif already hands off cleanly into Chapter 5, so the exit was left intact.
edits: Reframed the opening around Nina coming down from the townhouse at twenty past one.
Preserved the original route, rain pressure, and Nina's presentation details while shifting the entry point closer to Chapter 3's final image.
